projects.name: Learning English App – Vocabulary Platform
projects.description: Developed backend using Spring Boot and MySQL, designed RESTful APIs with JWT authentication, premium features, email notifications, and generated vocabulary exports to PDF and Word. Ensured code quality with JUnit and Mockito tests.

projects.name: Ecolink – Green Consumer E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Built a platform connecting users to eco-friendly products using Node.js, Express, and MS SQL Server. Developed REST APIs, implemented authentication, designed frontend with EJS + Bootstrap, handled image uploads, and deployed via XAMPP.

projects.name: Clothing Shop
projects.description: Built a full-stack E-commerce Website using React (Vite), Node.js/Express, MongoDB, and Redis in a Microservices Architecture. Containerized services with Docker, implemented horizontal scaling and load balancing using Nginx as a reverse proxy, and designed and implemented secure RESTful APIs for user authentication, product management, and shopping cart features.
